languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Друкари{/g} с шипением изрыгает несколько ругательств на родном языке.{/n} "Забавно. Забавно... до смерти забавно. Но долго развлекать себя играми огир я не желаю".

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Друкари{/g} с шипением изрыгает несколько ругательств на родном языке.{/n} "Забавно. Забавно... до смерти забавно. Но долго развлекать себя играми огир я не желаю".
traits.speaker: MarazhaiCompanion

languages.text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Funny. Yes, this little farce is to die for... Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."
languages.original_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Друкари{/g} с шипением изрыгает несколько ругательств на родном языке.{/n} "Забавно. Забавно... до смерти забавно. Но долго развлекать себя играми огир я не желаю".

traits.locale_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Amusing. Amusing... amusing to the point of death. Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

{n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Funny Very funny... painfully funny. Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

{n}With a hiss, the {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} leaps back, recoiling from something tangible to him alone. He reaches for the grenade at his belt — and suddenly comes to his senses. His clawed hand goes still, halfway toward the grenade. Cursing in his native tongue, Marazhai regains his composure.{/n} "It is actually rather amusing. Let's see at what point I grow weary of playing games with the Oghyr."

{n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Amusing. Amusing... amusing to the point of death. Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

{n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Funny Very funny... painfully funny. Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

{n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Funny. Yes, this little farce is to die for... Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

languages.text: {n}这名{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}黑暗灵族{/g}用母语嘶声骂了几句。{/n}“有趣，非常有趣……极其有趣。不过，我可没兴致陪这些遗落者的造物玩太久。”
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Funny Very funny... painfully funny. Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

traits.locale_text: {n}这名{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}黑暗灵族{/g}用母语嘶声骂了几句。{/n}“有趣，非常有趣……极其有趣。不过，我可没兴致陪这些遗落者的造物玩太久。”

languages.text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} crache un chapelet de malédictions dans sa langue natale.{/n} « Très drôle, vraiment. Douloureusement drôle. Cependant, je n'ai nulle intention de me laisser divertir plus longtemps par les petits jeux des Oghyr. »
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Funny Very funny... painfully funny. Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} crache un chapelet de malédictions dans sa langue natale.{/n} « Très drôle, vraiment. Douloureusement drôle. Cependant, je n'ai nulle intention de me laisser divertir plus longtemps par les petits jeux des Oghyr. »

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}, ana dilinde birkaç küfür tıslıyor.{/n} "Komik, çok komik... Acı verici derecede komik. Ancak kendimi Oghyr oyunlarıyla uzun süre eğlendirme arzum yok."
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Funny Very funny... painfully funny. Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}, ana dilinde birkaç küfür tıslıyor.{/n} "Komik, çok komik... Acı verici derecede komik. Ancak kendimi Oghyr oyunlarıyla uzun süre eğlendirme arzum yok."

languages.text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} suelta una serie de improperios en su lengua.{/n} «Gracioso. Muy gracioso... Casi me muero de risa. Pero no tengo ganas de participar en los juegos de los Oghyr más de lo necesario».
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Funny Very funny... painfully funny. Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

traits.locale_text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} suelta una serie de improperios en su lengua.{/n} «Gracioso. Muy gracioso... Casi me muero de risa. Pero no tengo ganas de participar en los juegos de los Oghyr más de lo necesario».

languages.text: {n}Der {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} zischt einige Flüche in seiner Sprache.{/n} "Witzig, sehr witzig ... schmerzhaft witzig. Aber ich habe keine Lust, mich lange mit den Spielchen des Oghyr zu befassen."
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hisses several curses in his native tongue.{/n} "Funny Very funny... painfully funny. Yet I have no desire to entertain myself with the games of the Oghyr for long."

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}ドルクハリー{/g}は、母語でいくつかの呪文を吐き出す。{/n}「面白い、とても面白い…痛々しいほど面白い。でも、オグイヤーの遊びに長く付き合う気はない。」
